title: Don't leak my base!
description: Disables block rotations (exept plants) and hides ores and bedrock (works with texture packs)
body:
Don't hide my base is a texture pack with the purpose to hide your base of you're streaming or recording youtube videos for people not to find your base.

### It works with ANY texture pack!

**How to install**
- Download BlockMask.zip
- Go to %appdata%
- Copy .zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks
